title: Rich Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with chicken, rich flavors, and a hint of glassy texture. Perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Heat butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add chicken to the pot and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pot. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add stew mix, chicken broth, and water to the pot. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
